settings.heading: Elegantly Dry Profile

settings.heading: What makes WESAKE different from other sake brands?
settings.content: WESAKE is crafted using traditional Japanese brewing methods with premium ingredients sourced directly from Japan. Our master brewers follow centuries-old techniques to create authentic Junmai Ginjo sake with exceptional purity and flavor complexity that mass-produced alternatives cannot match.

settings.heading: How should I serve WESAKE for the best experience?
settings.content: WESAKE is most enjoyable when served chilled between 45-50°F in traditional ochoko cups or wine glasses. You can also experiment with room temperature or gently warmed sake to discover different flavor profiles. Always store bottles upright in a cool, dark place.

settings.heading: What foods pair well with WESAKE Sakura Junmai Ginjo?
settings.content: Our elegant, dry profile complements sushi, sashimi, grilled fish, and light poultry dishes beautifully. The floral notes also pair well with soft cheeses, fruit-based desserts, and even spicy cuisine where the clean finish provides a cooling contrast.

settings.heading: Is WESAKE gluten-free and what is the alcohol content?
settings.content: Yes, WESAKE is naturally gluten-free as it is made exclusively from rice, water, koji, and yeast with no wheat or barley ingredients. Our Junmai Ginjo has an alcohol content of 15.5% ABV, which is standard for premium sake.

settings.heading: How long does WESAKE stay fresh after opening?
settings.content: Once opened, WESAKE maintains optimal flavor for 7-10 days when stored refrigerated with the cap tightly sealed. Unlike wine, sake does not improve with age, so we recommend enjoying it within this timeframe for the best taste experience.

settings.heading: Do you ship nationwide and what are the delivery options?
settings.content: We ship WESAKE to all states where alcohol delivery is legal, typically within 3-5 business days via our temperature-controlled shipping partners. Subscription members receive free shipping, while individual orders qualify for free shipping on orders over $75.

settings.heading: Honoring Tradition
settings.content: WESAKE was born from a deep respect for Japanese brewing heritage and a desire to share authentic sake with discerning drinkers worldwide. Our founder spent years studying with master brewers in Japan to bring this time-honored craft to your table.
